title: Unordered Lists
content:
### Unordered Lists (`
    `) Unordered lists display items with **bullets**. --- ### Basic Unordered List ```html
    • Item 1
    • Item 2
    • Item 3
    ``` --- ### List Style Types Use CSS `list-style-type` to change the bullet style: | Value | Result | |-------|--------| | `disc` | Filled circle (default) | | `circle` | Hollow circle | | `square` | Filled square | | `none` | No marker | ```html
    • Square bullets
    • No bullets
    ``` --- ### Removing Bullets ```html
    • Clean list without markers
    ``` --- ### Custom Icons as Bullets ```html
    • Custom bullet icon
    ``` --- ### Horizontal Navigation Menu ```html
    • Home
    • About
    • Contact
    ``` > **Pro Tip:** Unordered lists are commonly used for navigation menus (with `list-style: none` and flexbox).
codeExample:
• Default disc bullets
  • Item two
  • Square bullets
  • Item two
  • Circle bullets
  • Item two
  • No bullets

quiz.question: Which CSS property changes the bullet style?
